text: chazovn 'ovadeya koh-amar adonay yehvi leedovm shemu'a shama'enu meet yehva vetsir bagovyim shulach qumu venaquma 'aleyha lamilechama
hine qaton netatikha bagovyim bazuy ata meod
zedovn libekha hishiekha shokheni vechagevey-sela' merovm shivetov omer belibov mi yovrideni arets
im-tagebiha kanesher veim-beyn kovkhavim sim qinekha misham ovridekha neum-yehva
im-ganavim bau-lekha im-shovdedey layela eykh nidemeyta halov yigenevu dayam im-botserim bau lakh halov yasheiru 'olelovt
eykh nechepesu 'esav nive'u matsepunayv
'ad-hagevul shilechukha kol aneshey veritekha hishiukha yakhelu lekha aneshey shelomekha lachemekha yasimu mazovr tacheteykha eyn tevuna bov
halov bayovm hahu neum yehva vehaavadeti chakhamim meedovm utevuna mehar 'esav
vechatu gibovreykha teyman lema'an yikaret-ish mehar 'esav miqatel
mechamas achikha ya'aqov tekhasekha vusha venikherata le'ovlam
beyovm 'amadekha mineged beyovm shevovt zarim cheylov venakherim bau sha'arov kh she'arayv q ve'al-yerushalaim yadu govral gam-ata keachad mehem
veal-tere veyovm-achikha beyovm nakherov veal-tisemach liveney-yehuda beyovm avedam veal-tagedel pikha beyovm tsara
al-tavov vesha'ar-'ami beyovm eydam al-tere gam-ata bera'atov beyovm eydov veal-tishelachena vecheylov beyovm eydov
veal-ta'amod 'al-hapereq lehakherit et-pelitayv veal-taseger seridayv beyovm tsara
ki-qarovv yovm-yehva 'al-kal-hagovyim kaasher 'asita ye'ase lakh gemulekha yashuv beroshekha
ki kaasher shetitem 'al-har qadeshi yishetu khal-hagovyim tamid veshatu vela'u vehayu kelov hayu
uvehar tsiyovn tiheye feleyta vehaya qodesh veyareshu beyt ya'aqov et movrasheyhem ׃
vehaya veyt-ya'aqov esh uveyt yovsef lehava uveyt 'esav leqash vedalequ vahem vaakhalum velo-yiheye sarid leveyt 'esav ki yehva diber
veyareshu hanegev et-har 'esav vehashefela et-pelishetim veyareshu et-sede eferayim veet sede shomerovn uvineyamin et-hagile'ad
vegalut hachel-haze liveney yiserael asher-kena'anim 'ad-tsarefat vegalut yerushalaim asher bisefarad yireshu et 'arey hanegev
ve'alu movshi'im behar tsiyovn lishepot et-har 'esav vehayeta layhva hamelukha
